case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BARRY OWENS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT OWENS, BARRY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-14-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-21-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15252058) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57855102) FILED BY DEFENDANT OWENS, BARRY
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR MAYNE, STEPHEN STURDIVANT
ARBITRATOR STEPHEN STURDIVANT MAYNE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-09-2015 THROUGH FEB-07-2016.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OWENS, BARRY $11,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-09-2015. THE OCT-14-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
